title: Extra Large 30cm Non-Stick Frying Pan with Soft Touch Handle, 4.7L Capacity, Induction & All Hob Compatible, Dishwasher Safe, Premium 2.5mm Pressed Aluminium
features: Spacious 30cm Design – Perfect for cooking larger portions, this extra-large frying pan is ideal for family meals, batch cooking, or entertaining.
Durable Non-Stick Coating – Premium non-stick surface ensures effortless food release, easier cleanup, and healthier cooking with minimal oil.
Soft-Touch Handle for Comfort – Ergonomic and heat-resistant, the soft-touch handle provides a secure grip for safe and comfortable cooking.
Induction & All Hob Compatible – Designed for versatility, this frying pan is suitable for induction, gas, electric, and ceramic hobs.
Dishwasher Safe & Built to Last – Constructed from durable 2.5mm pressed aluminium, this pan delivers excellent heat distribution and withstands daily use with ease.
